Ore Terrae (Free verse)


The sun traces light through the sparse trees, It’s final act until the day next Slowly coalescing with the earth, It’s glow retreats behind the foothills.

The earth stages the sky, The next act primed to begin; Stars sprinkle the view, Painting the dark-violet curtains, Which mask the chaotic void of space

The mind loses worry, All thought is current Deeds of tomorrow are muted, Time waits, allowing peace; In this moment, bliss becomes eternal, The infinite momentarily suggests comfort, The soul, invited to the edge of earth.

īn nīz bogzarad
